name: vLLM Performance Optimization
description: Analyze and optimize vLLM inference performance. Identify optimization opportunities including tensor operations, caching, device memory transfers, batching, kernel tuning, and conditional work skipping. Based on real-world optimizations from vLLM contributors.
author: ZhongsJie

skills.name: vllm_perf
skills.description: Analyze and optimize vLLM performance. Use when working with vLLM inference optimization, performance profiling, throughput/latency improvements, tensor operations, kernel tuning, or any vLLM-related performance work.
